title: Derry Heights Rezoning
summary: Employment lands at Derry Road & James Snow Pkwy proposed for Mixed Use. Public comment period open until April 30.

title: Tremaine Road Subdivision
summary: 420-unit residential subdivision approved under Bill 23 streamlining provisions. Construction begins Q3 2025.

title: Highway 413 Corridor Study
summary: Provincial corridor protection order issued for Hwy 413 route through Milton's north end. Affects 14 properties.

title: Main St. Heritage Designation
summary: Downtown Milton heritage district proposed. 12 buildings on Main St. under review for cultural heritage designation.
